content: Tolgee CLI v2.20.0: config via .tolgeerc JSON with projectId:34, format:'JSON_TOLGEE', pull.path:'./messages'. API key via TOLGEE_API_KEY env var. Commands: tolgee pull (export all locales to pull.path), tolgee push (upload source). JSON_TOLGEE format = flat key-value JSON compatible with next-intl. Can add prebuild script: 'tolgee pull --path ./messages'. API key generated in Tolgee dashboard under API keys.
